intro: Sarcoglottis smithii, also known as Smith's Sarcoglottis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Sarcoglottis smithii include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
